retry_reason: This is a release function called when refcount is zero; retry would mean double-free/use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is the release function for msm_gem_submit objects, called when the last kref reference is dropped via kref_put. It performs complete cleanup: DRM scheduler job cleanup, fence ID removal, dma_fence puts, PID/submitqueue puts, and frees commands and the submit structure itself. After this function returns the object is freed; the caller must not access it further. No retry is possible as the object is already being destroyed. No special locking is required beyond the internal spinlock for IDR access.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is the final destructor for msm_gem_submit when its kref reaches zero, performing all cleanup and freeing the object. This is the canonical put/release wrapper.
